description: Diagnostic triage when board is powered at 5V via USB-C DCPS (no PD negotiation). Tests initial power chain through to PMU startup.
WARNING: M1 board (T8103). NO MagSafe. Two USB-C ports only. PMU naming: SERA=Master (U8100), SIMETRA=Slave (U7700). Test points are BOARD-SPECIFIC.

initial_conditions.power_supply: 5V via USB-C (DCPS mode, no PD negotiation)
initial_conditions.note: At 5V, charger IC should activate and produce PPBUS_AON if battery is connected. Without battery, PPBUS_AON may not establish.

if_missing.diagnosis: USB-C connector damage or CD3217 fault
actions: Inspect USB-C connector for physical damage
Check CC1/CC2 lines for shorts to ground
Check UF400 (ATC0) or UF500 (ATC1) for shorts
Measure diode mode on VBUS pins

steps.probe: Bulk capacitor near U5200 charger IC output

if_missing.diagnosis: Charger IC (U5200) not converting, or battery SYS_DETECT not triggered
actions: Check BMU connector (J5100) SYS_DETECT gasket (page 22)
Check CHGR_AUX_OK signal (page 24) - should be pulled high
Check charger IC U5200 input pins for 5V
Check for shorts on PPBUS_AON bulk caps
Measure CHGR_INT_L - should be high (no fault)

steps.probe: Bulk capacitor on PP3V8_AON output (near U5700)

actions: Check PPVAON_PWR_EN - must be asserted (delayed by D5340/D5345, page 24)
Check PPVAON_FAULT_L - if low, U5700 is reporting a fault
Check for shorts on PP3V8_AON_VDDMAIN distribution
Check U5910 current sense amplifier
Measure diode mode on PP3V8_AON output caps
If shorted: isolate VDDMAIN branches to find short location

steps.probe: Output capacitors of UC100 and UC200 (page 36)

actions: Check PP3V8_AON_VODMAN input to LDOs
If PP3V3_AON missing: UC100 fault or output shorted
If PP1V8_AON missing: UC200 fault or output shorted
Measure diode mode on LDO output caps

if_missing.diagnosis: PMU not starting or output shorted
actions: Check PP3V8_AON_VDDMAIN input to PMUs
Use thermal imaging to find hot component on shorted rail
If hot chip found: replace component
If no hot chip: PMU IC may be dead - replace U8100 (SERA) or U7700 (SIMETRA)

steps.probe: Output capacitors of UC320 and XMC710 (pages 38, 39)

if_missing.diagnosis: Standalone VR not enabled or faulty
actions: Check P5VS2_PWR_EN and P3V3S2_PWR_EN enable signals
If enable present but no output: VR IC fault
Check for shorts on output rail (diode mode on output caps)
Check inductor continuity

steps.if_present: Board has basic power chain functional at 5V. SoC should be attempting hard start.
